MSG.NAME: [WARNING][PAST]llc_llcp_per_sync_pdu_two_device_check ACL disconnect or adv not enable @llc_past_llcp.c(183),WARNING
[WARNING][PAST]llc_llcp_per_sync_pdu_two_device_check periodic not enable or aux has released auxcs = 0x%x @llc_past_llcp.c(191),WARNING
[WARNING][PAST]llc_llcp_per_sync_pdu_send can't get trancs info or the acl has disconnect @llc_past_llcp.c(302),WARNING
